title: [circt-verilog] `circt-verilog` produces non `comb`/`seq` dialects including `cf` and `llhd`
body:
I am trying to convert this file found in OpenTitan from SystemVerilog to MLIR:
https://github.com/lowRISC/opentitan/blob/d8b5efd1427152b8387d6e03d9db413167e58475/hw/top_englishbreakfast/ip_autogen/pwrmgr/rtl/pwrmgr_fsm.sv

When I run `circt-verilog`, it produces unexpected dialects like `cf` and `llhd`. I don't expect these dialects to be in the output.


Example:
```bash
ak2518@autobot:/local/scratch/ak2518/opentitan$ /local/scratch/ak2518/circt/build/bin/circt-verilog /local/scratch/ak2518/opentitan/hw/top_englishbreakfast/ip_autogen/pwrmgr/rtl/pwrmgr_fsm.sv -yhw/ip/prim_generic/rtl -yhw/ip/prim/rtl -yhw/top_englishbreakfast/ip_autogen/pwrmgr/rtl -yhw/ip/lc_ctrl/rtl -yhw/ip/rom_ctrl/rtl -UINC_ASSERT -Ihw/ip/prim/rtl -DYOSYS -DSYNTHESIS  | grep "llhd\."
    %92:19 = llhd.combinational -> i1, i1, i1, i1, i1, i1, i1, i1, i1, i12, i1, i1, i1, i1, i2, i2, i2, i1, i4 {
      llhd.yield %178, %179, %180, %181, %182, %183, %184, %185, %186, %198, %187, %188, %189, %190, %191, %192, %193, %194, %195 : i1, i1, i1, i1, i1, i1, i1, i1, i1, i12, i1, i1, i1, i1, i2, i2, i2, i1, i4
```


```bash
ak2518@autobot:/local/scratch/ak2518/opentitan$ /local/scratch/ak2518/circt/build/bin/circt-verilog /local/scratch/ak2518/opentitan/hw/top_englishbreakfast/ip_autogen/pwrmgr/rtl/pwrmgr_fsm.sv -yhw/ip/prim_generic/rtl -yhw/ip/prim/rtl -yhw/top_englishbreakfast/ip_autogen/pwrmgr/rtl -yhw/ip/lc_ctrl/rtl -yhw/ip/rom_ctrl/rtl -UINC_ASSERT -Ihw/ip/prim/rtl -DYOSYS -DSYNTHESIS  | grep "cf\."
      cf.cond_br %95, ^bb1(%req_pwrup_i, %reset_ongoing_q, %reset_cause_q, %u_fetch_en.lc_en_o, %c-1330_i12, %u_fetch_en.lc_en_o : i1, i1, i2, i4, i12, i4), ^bb2
```

I do not expect this behavior. I expect `circt-verilog` to produce code in the `seq`/`comb` dialects.


Version:
```bash
ak2518@autobot:/local/scratch/ak2518/opentitan$ /local/scratch/ak2518/circt/build/bin/circt-verilog --version
LLVM (http://llvm.org/):
  LLVM version 22.0.0git
  DEBUG build with assertions.
CIRCT 55f12edd1
slang version 9.0.0+54385bb
```
